description_long: This object depicts a walled residential property featuring two distinct houses separated by landscaped grounds. The larger house has a modern, multi-story design with extensive glass windows, curved balconies, and a flat roof, while the smaller house is more traditional with a pitched roof and simpler lines. The property is surrounded by a perimeter wall and includes a driveway, multiple trees, and manicured garden areas. The landscaping features pathways, green lawns, and shrubbery, creating a suburban neighborhood feel. The main house appears to have a prominent entryway with steps and a covered porch, while the secondary house is set back with its own access. The overall scene suggests a private, upscale residential compound with ample outdoor space.
description: A modern, multi-story house with extensive glass and curved balconies sits within a walled property, accompanied by a smaller traditional house, landscaped gardens, and a driveway.
description_view_0: This view highlights the two houses within the walled property, showing the landscaped grounds and the separation between the modern main house and the smaller traditional house.
description_view_1: From this angle, the driveway and main entryway to the modern house are prominent, with the secondary house visible in the background and the perimeter wall enclosing the property.
description_view_2: This side view emphasizes the curved balconies and glass facade of the main house, as well as the lush landscaping and the spatial relationship between the two houses.
description_view_3: Looking from the rear, the traditional house and its pitched roof are more visible, along with the garden layout and the tree-lined boundary of the property.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a wide door, steps, a covered porch, and modern overhangs; secondary house has a simpler entry with minimal ornamentation.
